brand.name: Anywise
brand.description: The word 'Anywise' combines 'any' and 'wise', meaning in any way, by any means possible, or anything it takes.

company.postal_address: PO BOX 292 Brunswick East, Victoria, Australia 3067
certifications: Certified Scrum Master (all staff and suppliers)
company.philanthropy: 20% of annual profits directed to philanthropic activities
company.ownership: Veteran-owned business with 50% female board representation

primary_mark.description: The primary wordmark is the preferred expression of the Anywise brand and the foundation of the core identity.
primary_mark.typography_notes: Bold, heavy weight with tightened letter spacing. Angled tops on 'n' and 'i' for character.

variants.name: Full Colour Reverse
variants.use_case: Use on dark or coloured backgrounds

logomark.name: any.
logomark.description: The 'any.' mark is a peelable element from the core identity used as an icon where the full wordmark becomes too small or illegible.
logomark.note: Should always be used where the word Anywise is present.

clear_space.description: No copy or images should appear within the clear space around the logo.

colour_palette.rationale: Three shades of green represent growth and new beginnings. Green is uncommon in the consulting industry, differentiating Anywise from competitors, and reflects the company's ethical and sustainable values.

body_copy.use: Body copy — open, welcoming and easy to read

graphic_language.description: Three symbols derived to represent the brand personality and expression. Can be used to create background patterns, textures, graphical shapes, pictograms, illustrations, and motion graphics.

symbols.name: any.thing
symbols.meaning: Everything done is to make a difference and have impact

symbols.name: any.way
symbols.meaning: Represents growth, direction, agility, and always progressing

symbols.name: any.one
symbols.meaning: Represents diversity, inclusivity, and openness to working with anyone

tone_principles: Welcoming of all people and backgrounds

style_guidelines: Treat images to look consistent with the Anywise brand
Never use stock photos that look staged
Apply brand green colour treatments to images where appropriate

portrait_guidelines.attire: Smart casual — no polos, no full suits and ties

documents_presentations.notes: Use brand colours, typography, and graphic language elements in all document and presentation templates

elements: anywise wordmark and certified B Corp logo

key_sections: Purpose driven projects — why we work

podcast.name: any.talk
podcast.subtitle: an anywise podcast
podcast.cover_art_style: Cream background, green circles, Open Sans Bold typography

animation_motion.concept: Animated reveal of the 'any.' prefix followed by cycling word completions: any.thing → any.way → any.one → anywise
